label: Nullglow Reliquary Rooms
description: Nullglow Reliquary Rooms forms a compact residence inset into a vitrified-stone hab tier of Vespera Tertius Nocturnis Bastion, its walls thickened with slagcrete and scavenged plasteel to blunt auroral backwash and electrostatic storm pressure. A narrow antechamber opens onto a sleeping alcove and a combined refectory-work space, all lit by hooded lumen strips and screened by layered insulation curtains. Built-in storage niches and a sealed wash recess are arranged around a central ventilation spine fitted with overbuilt filters against ash fall and vox-buzzing grit. The floorplate carries shock-bolted stanchions and cable conduits that tie the rooms into the bastion’s shielded utilities and enclosed skyway network.
